E-992-X | 450 | 448 | -2
E-104-B | 1200 | 1197 | -3

The counts happen every month but it's always just a few units.

hey, i'm seeing a 500 error on our /api/v1/checkout/complete endpoint. it's intermittent but seems to happen most during peak traffic. here is the snippet from the error logs:

[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: Internal Server Error - Request ID: 7721-ax
[2023-10-27 14:22:01] STACKTRACE: 
  at OrderService.processPayment (OrderService.js:142:12)
  at await PaymentGateway.authorize (PaymentGateway.js:88:5)
  at validateTransaction (TransactionManager.js:210:34)
  at TransactionManager.commit (TransactionManager.js:45:10)
  at APIController.handleCheckout (APIController.js:302:22)

it looks like it's failing during the payment authorization step, but the database connection seems fine. any idea what's causing the instability?
